description_long: This university building features a grand, symmetrical facade with a central block flanked by two long wings, forming a U-shaped layout. The exterior is characterized by red brick walls, white stone trim, and a series of large arched windows that run along each level, giving the structure a stately and historic appearance. The roof is covered with reddish-brown tiles, and the building includes prominent entryways at the ends of each wing, each adorned with decorative arches and columns. The central section is more elevated, with additional architectural detailing and a row of smaller windows at the top. The overall design suggests a blend of classical and institutional architectural elements, with a focus on symmetry and ornamentation. The building appears to be multi-storied, with ample space for academic and administrative functions.
description: A large, U-shaped university building with red brick walls, white stone trim, arched windows, and tiled roofs, featuring ornate entryways and classical detailing.
description_view_0: The front view shows the symmetrical facade with the central block and two wings, highlighting the main entryways and arched windows.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the wings and the detailed side entryway, with the roof's slope and window arrangement visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the building, showing the full U-shape and the uniform window pattern along the wings.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the side entryway, roof details, and the length of the building's wing.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway features a large arched doorway framed by white stone columns and decorative trim, with double wooden doors and a set of steps leading up to the entrance.
